description: Health Canada approved alectinib for the first-line treatment of patients with ALK-positive, locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) that is not amenable to curative therapy.

indication.indication: ALECENSARO (alectinib) is indicated for the first-line treatment of patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive, locally advanced (not amenable to curative therapy) or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
